name: DTaP Vaccine Codes
description: CVX and CPT codes for diphtheria, tetanus toxoids, and acellular pertussis (DTaP) vaccines for children under 7 years. Used in childhood immunization (CIS) measures. Requires 4 doses by age 2.
source: Public CMS/clinical references — placeholder for official NCQA value sets

codes.description: Diphtheria, tetanus toxoids and acellular pertussis vaccine (DTaP)
Diphtheria, tetanus toxoids and acellular pertussis vaccine, 5 pertussis antigens (DTaP)
Diphtheria, tetanus toxoids and acellular pertussis vaccine, unspecified formulation (DTaP)
Diphtheria, tetanus toxoids and pertussis vaccine (DTP — historical)
DTP-Haemophilus influenzae type b conjugate vaccine (historical)
DTaP-Haemophilus influenzae type b conjugate vaccine
Diphtheria, tetanus toxoids, and acellular pertussis vaccine (DTaP), when administered to individuals younger than 7 years, for intramuscular use
DTaP-IPV vaccine (Kinrix, Quadracel), for intramuscular use
